entry.title: Re: Event Based Revenue Recognition - deferred revenue po...
entry.content:
Hello @MartinDejl 

Your business scenario involves combined billing for physical goods (stock items) and prepaid services (non-stock items), with revenue recognition timing differences. Here's a structured approach to address your case in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition:

  1. Sales Order Configuration
  • Use Sales Order with mixed item categories:
    • TAN: Standard item category for physical goods – revenue recognized upon billing.
    • TAD (or custom Z* service category): For prepaid services – set to defer revenue at billing and trigger recognition later.
  1. Revenue Recognition Logic
  • Use Event-Based Revenue Recognition (EBRR)
    • TAN items use a billing-based event, → revenue is posted upon invoice.
    • TAD items use a deferred revenue account at billing, then manual/posting-triggered fulfilment to recognise revenue.
  1. Tracking Prepaid Usage and Expiry
  • Implement Provider Contracts via Subscription Billing Integration or Sales Contract with custom fields for:
    • Number of uses (e.g., 10-pack)
    • Expiration date logic (can be managed via custom business object in Key User Extensibility)
  1. Revenue Contract Setup
  • In Universal Journal, the billing triggers revenue contract creation for TAD items.
  • Revenue is held until the event (service rendered) is received from the external system → trigger revenue recognition via Journal Entry

Let me know if you need further information

With regard

Chuma

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now questions
entry.content:
It is harder to find information on it but there is also the SAP Companion. This is free!.

This allows for context sensitive help in SAP but only with the standard content, i.e no customisation.

Accessing and Using Standard SAP Content - SAP Community

This post provides some additional guidance.

Cheers

Brad

entry.title: Re: SSCUI: Maintain Route Determination维护路线确定
entry.content:
Hi,

 

Can we get its content in English ?

entry.title: SAPUI5 how to filter at column level
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to develop an fiori application for SAP S/4 HANA using BTP Business application studio.

Product and Product Description has 1:n relation.

I have two columns in one table and I would like to display both Product ID and Description (filtered language eq English) in one table.

I think I have to use the filter. But how can I apply the filter only to one column? I want to use the filter something like this.  {path:'to_Description',parameters:{select:'Description'}, filters: [{path: 'Language', operator: 'EQ', value1: 'EN'}]}

Below is how my table is which is not displaying description. My goal is to displaying description.

 

<Table id="table" width="auto" items="{path: '/Material', parameters: {expand: 'to_Description'} }" noDataText="{worklistView>/tableNoDataText}" busyIndicatorDelay="{worklistView>/tableBusyDelay}" growing="true" growingScrollToLoad="true" updateFinished=".onUpdateFinished">

                <columns>
                    <Column id="materialColumn">
                        <Text text="Product ID" id="materialColumnTitle"/>
                    </Column>
                    <Column id="descriptionColumn">
                        <Text text="Description" id="descriptionColumnTitle"/>
                    </Column>
                </columns>

                <items>
                    <ColumnListItem type="Navigation" press=".onPress" id="test3">
                        <cells>
                            <Text text="{Material}"/>
                            <Text text="{to_Description/ProductDescription}" id="test2"/>
                        </cells>
                    </ColumnListItem>
                             
                </items>
            </Table>

entry.title: Re: Learning Path for SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Great collection @laura_leote! Thanks for sharing! It makes our lives much easier. 😉

Knowledge is power. Never stop learning.

entry.title: FEH (Forward Error Handling) & ECH (Error Conflict Handler) - is there a way to bypass?
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

In my scenario - I wish to send the asynchronous error / fault message back to the caller (Non SAP system) instead of handling within SAP itself. I already have gone through a few blog posts on the same - one of them https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/feh-forward-error-handling-ech-error-conflict-handler/ba-p/13424519

The is indeed have extensive information about how to make FEH enabled and get this handled via ECH. But If I want to bypass this setup rather would like to send back to the caller system, is this at all possible? 

Any idea will be much helpful. 

My asynchronous SOAP service is BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateRequest_In. I wish to send this via - BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateConfirmation_Out. 

Thanks in advance!

- Regards, Somnath

entry.title: sap b1 servicelayer reachable from the internet - security
entry.content:
Hello,

do you know about sap b1 servicelayer security?
In case the service layer would be reachable from the internet?

We are using an external spend management cloudtool. (hosted by google and aws)
It exports the spend values to this servicelayer adress:

https://public-static-ip-of-the-local-sap-b1server:xxxxx/b1s/v2/Login/

Do you know about possibilities to improve security?
Maybe allowing source traffic only from AWS or Google Cloud is insecure.

entry.title: Re: could not find Entity for Unit of Measure grp(MEGRP)...
entry.content:
Would that be MARC-MEGRU and MVKE-MEGRU?

They are in the entities MARCMRPLS and MVKESALES, respectively.

For more info on model mapping, check transaction MDGM_MODEL_DETAILS

entry.title: Re: Bill of exchange payment request print out in France...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

In France (but also the case for Spain and Italy), it's common practice to send a bill of exchange (BoE) request to the customer for signature before the actual payment or bank presentation. In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, while the process to create a noted item using a special G/L indicator (R) works correctly after the payment run, there's no standard functionality to print the BoE request for customer signature.

 

The output setting in "Output Parameter Determination" only covers the BoE presentation to the bank, not the initial document that the seller prepares and sends to the customer for acceptance.

So, to your questions:

Is there a standard template to print the BoE request?
No, unfortunately not in the Public Cloud version.

 

Is it possible to print such a document?
Yes, but it would require a custom solution. You’d need to build your own form (via Adobe Forms) and trigger it based on data from noted items, either through a custom app or report.

 

What application object should be used?
There isn’t a dedicated one for BoE requests. The existing object is only for bank submission. You’d have to create a custom object or view to fetch the data and attach a print form to that.

 

What you can do :

If printing the BoE request is a must for your process, you could:

  1. Create a custom report showing the BoE noted items.
  2. Link it to a custom Adobe Form that mimics the BoE layout.
  3. Let users print or download the document directly from that report.

I hope this will help you answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Error in posting Gl entry
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

Could you please tell me on which technoogy's version you're working on and the screenshot of the error's message reference ?

Thank you in advance for your reply.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Bill of exchange payment request print out in France...
entry.content:
Dear Jeremy,

great thanks for your help

entry.title: Re: Error in establishing IDoc connection between SAP CPI...
entry.content:
Symptom

Inbound ORDERS05 IDoc sent from SAP CPI to S/4HANA over /sap/bc/srt/idoc fails with

CX_SOAP_APPLICATION – Unknown error occurred in the IDoc inbound processing

The same text appears both in CPI Monitoring and SRT_ELOG / Error Context inside S/4.

Root cause

Every IDoc segment tag in XML must carry the flag SEGMENT="1".

Only the top‐level control record in your payload has it; all child segments (E1EDK01, E1EDK14 …) are missing the attribute.

The XML→IDoc converter therefore raises an internal exception and the Web‑Service layer returns a generic HTTP 500 SOAP fault.

Fix (pick one of the two)

1. Let CPI do the dirty work

    • In your IDoc Receiver adapter, tick Apply Converter ▸ Convert to IDoc XML.

    • Pass the IDoc to CPI in flat format (control record line + data lines).

    • The adapter automatically adds SEGMENT="1" to every segment and applies the right namespace.

‑ OR ‑

    • Open your sample XML and add SEGMENT="1" to every segment tag, e.g.

      Quick manual patch

       

       

<E1EDK01 SEGMENT="1"> … </E1EDK01>
<E1EDK14 SEGMENT="1"> … </E1EDK14>

 

  • Re‑send the file.

After either fix, the IDoc should be created in S/4 (check WE02) – it may land in status 64 or 56 if partner‑profile settings are still incomplete.

Extra sanity checks (do these if you hit the next wall)

CheckTransaction / Place

SNDPOR CPIDEV defined as logical system

BD54

Inbound partner KU/C000003 with message type ORDERS & process code ORDE

WE20

CPI technical user has S_IDOC and S_ICF auth objects

SU01 / PFCG

No short dump EDI_XML_IDOC‑SEGMENT_MISSING_FLAG

ST22

entry.title: Re: FI-AA: Asset below-zero value
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

You're getting the error AA548 when trying to run depreciation in AFAB. That usually means SAP is trying to post accounting entries for depreciation but something is missing or misconfigured in the background specifically, in the setup of how asset accounting connects to the general ledger.

The message says there's a problem with the line item schema SAP_500_724. That schema controls what accounting entries are created during depreciation. If something is missing, like a GL account, the system can't generate the journal entries and throws this error.

Here's what you can check:

1. Account Determination (AO90)
Go to transaction AO90 and check if the right GL accounts are assigned for your asset class and depreciation areas. Make sure there are accounts for:

    • Asset acquisition
    • Depreciation expense
    • Accumulated depreciation

 

2. Asset Master Data (AS03)
Look at the asset you're depreciating. Make sure:

    • It has the right asset class
    • The depreciation area is active and correctly set up
    • It uses a valid depreciation key

 

3. Run AFAB in test mode
Try running the depreciation with test run + detailed log. SAP will usually show you which asset or account is causing the problem.

 

4. S/4HANA-specific
If you're on S/4HANA, make sure your depreciation expense accounts are also set up as secondary cost elements, since they now post to both FI and CO.

 

I hope this will help you answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: How to change GL account after Supplier invoice is po...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

Once a supplier invoice is posted, you can’t just go in and change the G/L account—it’s locked in. But there are a few ways to fix it depending on your situation:

1. Reverse and Repost (cleanest way)

If the invoice hasn’t been paid yet, the best option is to reverse it and post it again with the correct G/L account.

  • Use the “Manage Supplier Invoices” app or transaction FB08 (if you have access to the GUI).
  • Once reversed, create a new invoice with the correct account.

 

2. Post a Manual Journal Entry

If the invoice is already paid or you don’t want to reverse it, you can post a manual journal entry to move the amount from the wrong G/L to the right one.

  • Go to “Post General Journal Entries”
  • Debit the incorrect account and credit the correct one (or vice versa, depending on what happened).

This way, your financials are corrected, even if the original invoice stays as-is.

 

3. Use a Credit Memo and Repost

If you want to keep everything vendor-related clean:

  • Post a credit memo to cancel out the original invoice.
  • Then post a new invoice with the correct G/L account.

 

I hope this will help you answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Why the expiry date of SF "Certified Professional" in...
entry.content:
Hi,

I have the same issue as well that my Professional certifications show as "Expired" in Credly. They are not visible in "https://learning.sap.com/my-learning/certifications" as well. One of my colleague had reached out to SAP and their reply was that the SF Professional qualification will be valid until the Associate certification is active. The SAP Development Team is working on a solution to bring the professional level qualification as well on SAP Learning (LCS) and the professional certification validity will be extended before the expiration date. There is no solution to this yet. In addition, almost everyone with Professional certification/s I know is facing this issue.

entry.title: Re: Eclipse ADT crashes by splash screen on Mac due to eclipse.ini "--module-path..."
entry.content: The note 2971147 asks to check the current Java version, but you say you "added long time ago". So, what is your CURRENT Java version?

entry.title: No of container not reflecting in recurring inspection
entry.content:
While doing GRN against  purchase order there is option to enter No of containers (ANZGEB) under quantity tab and also while creating manual inspection lot for 09 inspection type under origin tab we again have a field to enter No of containers but when inspection lot is created through job through QA07 and also it is scheduled in background we don't have option to enter no of containers. 

 

Business requirement is what ever value is entered for No of containers for the Batch at the time of 101 goods receipt against purchase order that value should come automatically for No of containers (ANZGEB) against each batch while creating inspection lot through QA07.

entry.title: Re: SAP Enterprise Architecture Framework
entry.content: Thank you @Rene_de_Daniel !

entry.title: CAP bookshop sample, fixing the translation editor for localizations
entry.content:
When using CAP with NodeJS runtime, you may have been in contact with the "bookshop sample" over the years. This is also generated as complete sample application in your project folder, when you run

cds add sample

on the command line.

You may have noticed, that in the UI on the object (detail) page for a book, in the "Translations" section it is currently not possible to add another localization line with a locale, title and description for further languages. There is no data available as value help and whatever you enter as locale in the draft is not accepted:

If you leave it empty, you can save the draft, but then you have no locale for your new entry and also this can not be edited afterwards:

To be honest, I was a bit surprised, that this sample, which SAP uses in many tutorials / learning courses and included in the CDS tooling to be generated as sample, shows such a basic deficiency.

The reasons seems to be, that this sample was developed earlier for OData V2 and not migrated cleanly over time to OData V4. The main problem in the file ‎app/admin-books/fiori-service.cds is the following line, which is not valid anymore in OData V4:

locale @(ValueList.entity: 'Languages', Common.ValueListWithFixedValues)

The fixes seem to be relatively simple. In the file ‎app/admin-books/fiori-service.cds you add in the header:

using {sap} from '@sap/cds/common';
using from '@sap/cds-common-content';

The locale annotation block has to be replaced.
Old:

// Add Value Help for Locales
annotate AdminService.Books.texts {
  locale @(rvice.c
    ValueList.entity: 'Languages',
    Common.ValueListWithFixedValues, //show as drop down, not a dialog
  )
};o OData

New: ValueL

// Add Value Help for Locales
annotate AdminService.Books.texts with {
  locale @(
    Common.FieldControl : #Mandatory,
    Common.ValueListWithFixedValues,
    Common.ValueList : {
      $Type         : 'Common.ValueListType',
      CollectionPath: 'Languages',
      Parameters    : [
        { $Type            : 'Common.ValueListParameterInOut',
          LocalDataProperty: locale,
          ValueListProperty: 'code' },
        { $Type            : 'Common.ValueListParameterDisplayOnly',
          ValueListProperty: 'descr' }
      ]
    }
  );
};

In package.json in the dependencies, you will have to add "@sap/cds-common-content": "^2.1.0", like:

"dependencies": {
  "@sap/cds": "^8",
  "@sap/cds-common-content": "^2.1.0",
  "express": "^4"
},

This can be done on the command line with:

npm add @sap/cds-common-content --save

This will show all language / country codes currently defined in the cds-common package as value help for the locale field:

If you select 'es' and add some text, after saving the draft, you will see:

If you do not want to see all predefined languages / country codes and want to override it with a selection of your choice, you can add a table as CSV in the db/data folder under the name db/data/sap.common-Languages.csv for example with this content:

code;descr
de;Deutsch
en;English
fr;Français
es;Español
it;Italiano

Hoping this helps - and hoping SAP will fix their sample code generated by the cds tool as well.
(Sorry for some strange characters and formattings in this post, but it could not be fixed using the buggy WYSIWYG editor)

entry.title: SAP Continous Integration & Delivery - Branch with pattern not working
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We have a job in our SAP CI/CD instance which is supposed to be triggered on all the branches starting by feature. For this, we have followed the nomenclature feature*. Configuration screenshot as follows:

Unfortunately, when developers are pushing code to their respective feature branches the job is not triggered.

Based on this video tutorial, this should be possible but it is not working for us.

https://www.sap.com/assetdetail/2023/11/fa4748fb-967e-0010-bca6-c68f7e60039b.html

Any idea what we may be missing?

Thanks,

C.

entry.title: Re: SAP Continous Integration & Delivery - Branch with pa...
entry.content:
Sorted. Our feature branches are named with slashes.

Based on the documentation we need to use ** if we want to include slashes.

https://help.sap.com/docs/continuous-integration-and-delivery/sap-continuous-integration-and-delivery/configure-multi-branch-job?language=en-US&q=branch

Changing the branch name to feature** solved our issue.

Thanks,

C.

What's the issue here? What need to be checked here?

entry.content: Hi, thanks for the reply, RDC in this case will be remote desktop connection. We are trying to use a python program to call a websocket RFC into the SAP remote desktop connection GUI and access a specific API endpoint there.

entry.title: Re: sap b1 servicelayer reachable from the internet - sec...
entry.content: Hi, I can recommend you this blog from @EunSeok_Bang to learn more about NGINX and SAP Business One

entry.title: Re: Uploading Business Partner Data using LSMW
entry.content:
Hola, buenas tardes.

Espero que se encuentre muy bien, me puede compartir el enlace.

entry.title: Error in CJI3 FIELD error in CJI3 FIELD MBGBTR - Total amount recorded
entry.content:
A client reported that the quantities from the recorded material document are not being displayed in the Total Amount Recorded (MBGBTR) field.
The case was reviewed and the following was observed:
The report is not generating the volumetric value (Total Amount Recorded (MBGBTR) field - CJI3) because the data is not being received from the MM module. This was verified by reviewing the COEP table, and the record is not displayed, and therefore is not shown in the report.
Does anyone have any clue as to why this situation is occurring?
Thank you for your support.

entry.title: Re: SAP Databricks is now GA. Get the most of it skilling yourself with Mosaic AI
entry.content:
Hi @MarioDeFelipe 

Thank you for this detailed post, much appreciated. 

If a Customer would like to leverage its existing investment in Databricks will these restrictions apply ? We use all the features not available + Databricks Asset Bundle quite extensively .

Thanks 

Afshin

entry.title: Re: 2505 C4C Release Content
entry.content: Still no documentation until now. Test tenant are already upgraded. 😞

entry.title: Re: Delivery Completion Indicator PO item - MM_PUR_S4_PO_...
entry.content: Hi Jagoda,

entry.title: Re: Delivery Completion Indicator PO item - MM_PUR_S4_PO_...

entry.title: Re: F-92 Asset Retirement Check Box is missing
entry.content: perfect ans

entry.title: Re: Question about SF ATS adoption in China
entry.content: We had similar situation at our end and were advised internally and externally (including SAP) not to use global instance (hosted outside of China) of recruitment module for China. in other words, it is recommended that customers use SAP data center in China if they want to SF recruitment module for China. For now we process recruitment related activities outside of SF for China and hire employees directly in EC. Next year we will look at the option of using SAP data center in China for recruitment activities and integrating this with our global instance in EU for non recruitment related activities.

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Melbourne - 21th May 2025
entry.content:
@jkmaeda711 , very sorry missed this post.

Would we be able to hold the Aug event at 7 - Eleven corporate office ? We are hoping to have this event on the 20th Aug. Would this work for you all ?

Thank you very much for offering to host this event. Greatly appreciated.

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Melbourne - 20th Aug 2025
entry.content:
Hi SAP Melbourne Community,

Come and join us for the 3rd SAP Inside Track for this year 2025 

Date: 20th Aug 2025

Time : 6pm to 9pm

Location: TBA

Note : Please bring your ID card

Agenda :

6.00pm – Catchup with Community ( Drinks will be served)

6.30pm– Topic 1

7pm – Topic 2

7.30 pm – Catchup with SAP Community (Drinks and Pizza will be served)

8.30 pm – Wrap up

Thankyou!

See you there

Cheers,

SAP Community

@pjcools, @Machillanda @BenPatterson @Saikrishna_Sriram

entry.title: Re: Customer Hierarchy In Condition Contract / delta accrual
entry.content: Hi, I am using a copy of 0s02 contract type. All other key combinations work just fine in the pricing procedure of the delta accrual document 0s42

entry.title: Action is not Trigger, When I call from Script type Event Handler.
entry.content:
Hi,

I have created a button labeled "Call Co-Owner", and on click, I’m invoking a Script-type Event Handler. Within the script, I’m attempting to trigger an Action button and update a specific field with the value "One".

However, it appears that the Action is not being triggered as expected.

Could you please help me understand why the action might not be firing, or suggest any steps I can take to resolve this?

This is the Event Handler Script.

This is the Action I have to call 

Please help me. What things am I doing wrong?

 

C4C Service SAP Cloud Applications Studio SAP Cloud Application Programming Model C4C Sales C4C Extensibility SAP enhancement package for SAP CRM

entry.title: Moving Forward
entry.content:
Dear SAP Business One community

Today I want to talk about how you could with a few simple actions, copy specific lines or complete documents within the web client.

Let’s look at this video to learn more.

You can find additional information in the SAP Business One Web client user guide and the Learning journey.

Regards

Ari

entry.title: Re: Subcontracting Indicator in 'Change Maintenance Order...
entry.content:
Hi Riyaz,

For Public Cloud Edition, external refurbishment through subcontracting feature is planned for Q2/2026.

For Private Cloud Edition, activate below business functions -

LOG_EAM_ROTSUB
LOG_EAM_ROTSUB_2
LOG_MM_SERNO

Regards,

Vijay

entry.title: Hide ALV toolbar icons after refresh table display
entry.content:
Experts, 

I am displaying ALV using method set_table_for_first_display. I am excluding toolbar icons using it_toolbar_excluding  parameter in this method. Button EDIT has been added in application toolbar to allow users to select one or more rows and edit the data. Event handle_change_finished has been used to  call method refresh table display to reflect the edited data in ALV. When this method is called, I see that standard ALV toolbar with append, insert and delete row icons is shown. I want to exclude these icons but don't see a way to influence this in refresh table display method call. I found an old SCN thread where they had suggested to call method set_table_for_first_display again instead of refresh table display. I highlight the cells in the rows selected for editing. This highlighting works fine only when I use refresh table display and doesn't work when I use set table display method. So I believe I have to go with refresh table display method to meet my requirement. 
Can you please let me know if its possible to hide the standard ALV icons after refresh table display method call? Is there any other better approach to handle this. I don't want users to have access to icons which are not relevant to them. 

*******Code to display ALV
    me->exclude_alv_toolbar( ).

    CALL METHOD go_grid->register_edit_event
      EXPORTING
        i_event_id = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_evt_enter.

    CALL METHOD go_grid->set_table_for_first_display
      EXPORTING
        is_layout            = value lvc_s_layo( sel_mode = 'A' stylefname = 'CELLTAB' ctab_fname = 'CELLCOLOR' no_rowmark = abap_false )
        it_toolbar_excluding = gt_exclude
      CHANGING
        it_fieldcatalog      = gt_fieldcat
        it_outtab            = gt_final.

    SET HANDLER me->handle_top_of_page FOR go_grid.
    SET HANDLER me->handle_change_finished FOR go_grid.

    CALL METHOD cl_gui_cfw=>flush.

*******Code to handle sy-ucomm for EDIT button in PAI
MODULE user_command_0100 INPUT.
  CASE sy-ucomm.
    WHEN 'BACK' OR 'EXIT' OR 'CANCEL'.
      LEAVE PROGRAM.
    WHEN 'EDIT'.
      lo_cashdesk->edit_records( ).
    WHEN 'SAVE'.
      lo_cashdesk->save_edit_data( ).
    WHEN 'UNDO'.
      lo_cashdesk->undo_edit_data( ).
  ENDCASE.
ENDMODULE.

********Method called when user clicks EDIT button 
 METHOD edit_records.
    DATA lv_valid TYPE c.
    DATA lt_row_no     TYPE lvc_t_roid.
    DATA lt_stylerow TYPE lvc_t_styl.
    DATA ls_stylerow TYPE lvc_s_styl.
    DATA lt_cellcolor TYPE lvc_t_scol.
    DATA ls_cellcolor TYPE lvc_s_scol.
    DATA ls_stable TYPE lvc_s_stbl.

    CLEAR lt_row_no.
    CALL METHOD go_grid->get_selected_rows
      IMPORTING
        et_row_no = lt_row_no.

    IF NOT lt_row_no IS INITIAL.
      LOOP AT gt_final ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<lfs_final>).
        READ TABLE lt_row_no ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<lfs_row_no>) WITH KEY row_id = sy-tabix.
        IF sy-subrc = 0.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'TOTAL'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'REC_NO'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'NAME'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'ELECRTICITY'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_enabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_cellcolor-fname = 'ELECRTICITY'.
          ls_cellcolor-color-col = 6.
          INSERT ls_cellcolor INTO TABLE lt_cellcolor.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'FRESH_WATER'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_enabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_cellcolor-fname = 'FRESH_WATER'.
          ls_cellcolor-color-col = 6.
          INSERT ls_cellcolor INTO TABLE lt_cellcolor.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'SALT_WATER'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_enabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_cellcolor-fname = 'SALT_WATER'.
          ls_cellcolor-color-col = 6.
          INSERT ls_cellcolor INTO TABLE lt_cellcolor.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'INST_FEE'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_enabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_cellcolor-fname = 'INST_FEE'.
          ls_cellcolor-color-col = 6.
          INSERT ls_cellcolor INTO TABLE lt_cellcolor.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'LABOUR_FEE'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_enabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_cellcolor-fname = 'LABOUR_FEE'.
          ls_cellcolor-color-col = 6.
          INSERT ls_cellcolor INTO TABLE lt_cellcolor.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'FINE'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_enabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_cellcolor-fname = 'FINE'.
          ls_cellcolor-color-col = 6.
          INSERT ls_cellcolor INTO TABLE lt_cellcolor.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'BALDIAH'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_enabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_cellcolor-fname = 'BALDIAH'.
          ls_cellcolor-color-col = 6.
          INSERT ls_cellcolor INTO TABLE lt_cellcolor.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'SEC_DEPO'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_enabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_cellcolor-fname = 'SEC_DEPO'.
          ls_cellcolor-color-col = 6.
          INSERT ls_cellcolor INTO TABLE lt_cellcolor.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'PAYON_ACC'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_enabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_cellcolor-fname = 'PAYON_ACC'.
          ls_cellcolor-color-col = 6.
          INSERT ls_cellcolor INTO TABLE lt_cellcolor.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'CON_CHARGE'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_enabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_cellcolor-fname = 'CON_CHARGE'.
          ls_cellcolor-color-col = 6.
          INSERT ls_cellcolor INTO TABLE lt_cellcolor.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'R'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
        ELSE.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'TOTAL'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'REC_NO'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'NAME'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'ELECRTICITY'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'FRESH_WATER'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'SALT_WATER'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'INST_FEE'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'LABOUR_FEE'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'FINE'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'BALDIAH'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'SEC_DEPO'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'PAYON_ACC'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'CON_CHARGE'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
          ls_stylerow-fieldname = 'R'.
          ls_stylerow-style = cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled.
          INSERT ls_stylerow INTO TABLE lt_stylerow.
        ENDIF.
        CLEAR: <lfs_final>-celltab, <lfs_final>-cellcolor.
        TRY.
            INSERT LINES OF lt_stylerow INTO TABLE <lfs_final>-celltab.
          CATCH cx_sy_itab_duplicate_key.
        ENDTRY.
        TRY.
            INSERT LINES OF lt_cellcolor INTO TABLE <lfs_final>-cellcolor.
          CATCH cx_sy_itab_duplicate_key.
        ENDTRY.
        CLEAR: lt_stylerow, ls_stylerow, lt_cellcolor, ls_cellcolor.
      ENDLOOP.
    ENDIF.

    go_grid->check_changed_data( ).
    IF go_grid->is_ready_for_input( ) EQ 0.
      CALL METHOD go_grid->set_ready_for_input
        EXPORTING
          i_ready_for_input = 1.
    ENDIF.
    ls_stable-row = abap_true.
    ls_stable-col = abap_true.
    CALL METHOD go_grid->refresh_table_display
      EXPORTING
        is_stable = ls_stable
      EXCEPTIONS
        finished  = 1
        OTHERS    = 2.

  ENDMETHOD.

*******Method handle change finished
METHOD handle_change_finished.
    DATA ls_stable TYPE lvc_s_stbl.
    IF et_good_cells IS NOT INITIAL.
      APPEND LINES OF et_good_cells TO gt_good_cells.
      LOOP AT et_good_cells INTO DATA(ls_good_cells) GROUP BY ls_good_cells-row_id.
        READ TABLE gt_final ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<lfs_final>) INDEX ls_good_cells-row_id.
        IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
          LOOP AT et_good_cells INTO DATA(ls_good_cells_value) WHERE row_id = ls_good_cells-row_id.
            CASE ls_good_cells_value-fieldname.
              WHEN 'ELECRTICITY'.
                <lfs_final>-elecrticity = <lfs_final>-elecrticity / 10.
              WHEN 'FRESH_WATER'.
                <lfs_final>-fresh_water = <lfs_final>-fresh_water / 10.
              WHEN 'OTHER'.
                <lfs_final>-other = <lfs_final>-other / 10.
              WHEN 'INST_FEE'.
                <lfs_final>-inst_fee = <lfs_final>-inst_fee / 10.
              WHEN 'LABOUR_FEE'.
                <lfs_final>-labour_fee = <lfs_final>-labour_fee / 10.
              WHEN 'FINE'.
                <lfs_final>-fine = <lfs_final>-fine / 10.
              WHEN 'BALDIAH'.
                <lfs_final>-baldiah = <lfs_final>-baldiah / 10.
              WHEN 'SEC_DEPO'.
                <lfs_final>-sec_depo = <lfs_final>-sec_depo / 10.
              WHEN 'SALT_WATER'.
                <lfs_final>-salt_water = <lfs_final>-salt_water / 10.
              WHEN 'PAYON_ACC'.
                <lfs_final>-payon_acc = <lfs_final>-payon_acc / 10.
              WHEN 'CON_CHARGE'.
                <lfs_final>-con_charge = <lfs_final>-con_charge / 10.
              WHEN OTHERS.
            ENDCASE.
          ENDLOOP.
          <lfs_final>-total = <lfs_final>-elecrticity + <lfs_final>-fresh_water + <lfs_final>-salt_water + <lfs_final>-inst_fee +
                              <lfs_final>-labour_fee + <lfs_final>-other + <lfs_final>-payon_acc + <lfs_final>-fine + <lfs_final>-con_charge.
        ENDIF.
      ENDLOOP.
      ls_stable-row = abap_true.
      ls_stable-col = abap_true.
      CALL METHOD go_grid->refresh_table_display
        EXPORTING
          is_stable = ls_stable
        EXCEPTIONS
          finished  = 1
          OTHERS    = 2.
    ENDIF.
  ENDMETHOD.

 I have attached images of initial ALV display where I have successfully hidden icons on ALV toolbar. 2nd attachment shows ALV with standard ALV tool bar icons which is shown after user selects a row and clicks EDIT icon. 

IMG # 1: Initial ALV display where I have hidden the icons using it_toolbar_excluding parameter

IMG # 2: ALV toolbar with standard icons displayed after refresh table display method call

Thanks

Bharath

entry.title: How to use .where() multiple times while working with projection functions, CQL, OData?
entry.content:
Hello team,
I have following Odata query which works fine in Postman. Now I have to implement same logic in CAP.
.com/odata/v4/OPPS/BusinessUnitAssignments?$filter=(businessUnitID eq '1234')&$expand=promotion($filter=statusCode ne 'AC' and filterBuId eq 'CZP1%7C2B';$expand=promotionPriceDerivationRules($select=priceDerivationRuleID)) 

Here we need to expand promotion but only include promotions that match statusCode='AC' and filterBuId='CZP1|2B'

As you can see in query, we have to use 2 times expand, hence joined query with "semicolon". But in first expand we must use $filter, but in the beginning of query, we have already used $filter.
In CAP, $filter == .where()
How to use .where() clause in this situation?
Please support. Thanks.
Ex- This below snippet examples works fine but now how to use statusCode and filterBuId

            const results = await remote.run(
                SELECT.from(BusinessUnitAssignments)
                    .columns(b => {
                        b.businessUnitID,
                        b.promotion(p => {
                            p.promotionID,
                            p.promotionPriceDerivationRules(r => {
                                r.promotionPriceDerivationRuleID
                            })
                        })
                    })
                    .where({
                        businessUnitID: CustomerID,
                    })
            );

@vvdries @gregorw @qmacro

entry.title: Application Development using FHIR
entry.content:
FHIR is not just about interoperability and means of compliance measures, but much more beyond. Unleash healthcare applications using FHIR. Here is why and how…

🔥 Extensibility: FHIR is designed to be extensible, allowing developers to adapt it to specific needs. SAP Health Data Services for FHIR leverages this with a metadata-driven architecture, making it easier to extend and configure applications to meet evolving business needs and healthcare regulations.
🔥 Security: FHIR incorporates security specifications and best practices. SAP Health Data Services for FHIR builds upon this, providing a secure foundation for healthcare applications, integrated with SAP BTP services.
🔥 Interoperability: FHIR's core purpose is to facilitate interoperability in healthcare. It provides specifications for APIs and information exchange, enabling seamless integration with systems within a hospital landscape via FHIR-enabled communication servers.
🔥 Analytics: FHIR's structured data and API access make it suitable for integration with analytics platforms.
🔥 Ease of building applications: SAP Health Data Services for FHIR, built on FHIR, simplifies application development with built-in APIs, persistency, a configurable domain model, and cloud qualities. It offers convenient, content-driven development mechanisms, reducing development time and operational effort.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Hi everyone! I’m Lance, thrilled to be here and eager to learn, share, and grow with this amazing community!

entry.title: Re: SAC Modeler - load data into a model - defines blank...
entry.content: Thank you so much for your help!

entry.title: Service in IDES instance is not reachable
entry.content:
I got myself an IDES instance on cal.sap.com because I wanted to try out some built-in OData service to handle production orders. It seems that the services are configured correctly:

- In transaction SICF under the default_host node there are services, and they are all activated
- In transaction SMICM the ICM is up and running without any obvious problems
- When I switch to ICM -> services, I can see that the port is 0 and the host name is set to a dummy value
- When I try to change port / host there it says "Service HTPP... can not be started" but its already running.
- Trying to adjust host parameters in RZ11 didn't change anything

Can anyone give me hot tip what else to check?

entry.title: Re: HCI : How to call multiple API'S and Combine into a single message
entry.content: You can follow either of the process( depends on the requirement ) and I am assuming you don't have any input data based on which you need to query.    Based on the above requirement what if I have any input assume input coming from sap --> cpi SFSF -->SAP. May I know the how we can proceed with this kind of requirement

entry.title: Cust (ONB) Custom Onboarding Task Initiated/Completed Template- not sent according to user's locale
entry.content:
Hi,

I’ve created copies of both the (ONB) Custom Onboarding Task Initiated Template and the (ONB) Custom Onboarding Task Completed Template notifications. However, unlike the (ONB) Prepare for New Team Member Template notification, these two notifications are not being sent according to the user’s locale.

Could you please advise on how to resolve this issue?

Thank you!

Best regards,
Lital

entry.title: Learning Hub Partner Edition - Four attempts for certification
entry.content:
Hi colleagues!

Not so long ago we bought a SAP Learning Hub Subscription - Partner Edition so one of our consultants can take the assessment and comply with the Stay Certified program. 

We're seeing that after he activated the subscription 4 attempts were made available. Today we bought one more license for another consultant and was activated successfully. My question is:

Are the 4 attempts per user or global for all user licenses that we acquire?

For example:
2 Users = 4 attempts per user = 8 attempts in total.

2 Users or more = 4 attempts in total.

In my understanding the attempts should be per user and not limited to 4 globally. Am I correct about this?

Thanks in advance for your help!

Kind regards!

entry.title: Re: Extractors / CDS-Views for Capex Investment, Cash Flo...
entry.content: Good day Maggie, many thanks for sharing theses useful tips.

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM Podcast - Episode 21 - Maintenance Logistics with SAP EWM
entry.content:
Hello Andres 

I hope you are great, I have a question , how the following picking process works : 

  • Shipping of the components to an external address

I entered a Delivery address at the component level in the Pm Order, see image below, but the address is not copying into the Outbound Delivery, Kindly advice what is missing or is this feature not yet available.

thanks for the great blog and advice.

Fernando

entry.title: Re: Subcontracting Indicator in 'Change Maintenance Order...
entry.content: Thanks VijayGS - All three BFs are activated in my private cloud system, still no luck as you can see below screenshot, 'Subcontracting' tick box is not visible.

entry.title: Stated Amount Including Input Tax - Manage service entry sheet - lean service app
entry.content:
Dear all,
When creating a service entry sheet using the "Manage Service Entry Sheet – Lean Services" app, I enter a tax code of 5%. However, I want the system to calculate the "Stated Amount Including Input Tax" by adding the tax amount to the "Stated Amount".
For example:

  • Stated Amount = 100 USD

  • Tax (5%) = 5 USD

  • Expected "Stated Amount Including Input Tax" = 105 USD

Currently, the system does not add the tax amount to the stated amount.
How can I configure or enter data so that the tax is added to the stated amount to reflect the total including input tax, as required by our customer?

entry.title: Re: Indian Accounting Standards Day: S/4HANA Empowers Compliance and Financial Transformation
entry.content:
Thanks Srinath

 Very informative and insightful

entry.title: Re: Hide ALV toolbar icons after refresh table display
entry.content: Please embed the images, otherwise everyone has to click each image one by one, and they are displayed separately from the question.

entry.title: Re: Change Management - Change record in SAP S/4 HANA 2023
entry.content: @rvarulselvan I am facing an issue — when I create a change record, it gets created, but the system does not generate a change number. Could you please help me identify the issue?

entry.title: Re: Hide ALV toolbar icons after refresh table display
entry.content:
I guess it's because you call set_ready_for_input( 1 ) after pressing the button which makes the buttons appear.

Move the call before set_table_for_first_display and set the styles of all cells to mc_style_disabled.

You may also not call the method at all, pass EDIT = 'X' instead:

is_layout            = value lvc_s_layo( edit = 'X' ...

NB: your code is difficult to read concerning the change of styles, I suggest this writing:

DATA(names_of_editable_fields) = VALUE string_table( ( `ELECRTICITY` )
                                                     ( `FRESH_WATER` )
                                                     ( `SALT_WATER` )
                                                     ( `INST_FEE` )
                                                     ( `LABOUR_FEE` )
                                                     ( `FINE` )
                                                     ( `BALDIAH` )
                                                     ( `SEC_DEPO` )
                                                     ( `PAYON_ACC` )
                                                     ( `CON_CHARGE` ) ).
LOOP AT gt_final ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<lfs_final>).
  DATA(index_of_alv_row) = sy-tabix.
  LOOP AT names_of_editable_fields ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fieldname>).
    <lfs_final>-celltab   = VALUE #( ( fieldname = <fieldname>
                                       style     = COND #( WHEN line_exists( lt_row_no[ row_id = index_of_alv_row ] )
                                                           THEN cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_enabled
                                                           ELSE cl_gui_alv_grid=>mc_style_disabled ) ) ).
    <lfs_final>-cellcolor = VALUE #( ( fname     = <fieldname>
                                       color-col = 6 ) ).
  ENDLOOP.
ENDLOOP.

Also, the "FS" part of field symbol names <LFS...> is useless, it's obvious that <...> is a field symbol.

NB: catching duplicate lines of INSERT is useless because your code doesn't pass duplicate lines so the exception will never happen.
